amountMinor.description: Monetary amount in the smallest currency unit — emitted as `integer` with `format: int64` via `bigint`.
Monetary amount in the smallest currency unit — emitted as `integer` with `format: int64` via `bigint`.

addMentions.description: User IDs to add to mentions

removeMentions.description: User IDs to remove from mentions

likedBy.description: User IDs who liked the comment

replyTo.description: Parent comment ID if this is a reply

get.description: Lists every admin-visible report. Demonstrates multi-scheme OR security and `@servers`.

post.description: Schedules a new admin report generation.

Location.description: URL where the generated report will be available

get.description: Returns a paginated list of invoices. Exercises wildcard responses and `@link`.
Fetches a single invoice by identifier. Response properties are all `readonly` to emit `readOnly: true`.
Returns a CSV export body using an explicit non-JSON media type.

get.summary: Redirect to the latest export artifact.
get.description: Demonstrates redirect-style transport routes from typed route modules.
Returns success or error response (demonstrates discriminated union types)

post.description: Send notification via email, SMS, or push (demonstrates discriminated unions)

get.description: Retrieve comments for a specific task within a project and organization

post.description: Add a new comment to a specific task

patch.description: Modify an existing comment on a task

delete.description: Remove a comment from a task (soft delete)

post.description: Demonstrates ReturnType and Parameters utility types

get.description: Demonstrates Awaited<ReturnType<typeof func>> utility type support

patch.description: Demonstrates Awaited<ReturnType<typeof func>> with async functions

get.description: Returns a paginated list of reports. Requires both Bearer token and API key.

post.description: Creates a new report. Requires Bearer token and a partner-specific token.

get.description: Demonstrates generic wrapper responses for session resources that can be authenticated by bearer, API key, or a session cookie.

patch.description: Extends or revokes a session while preserving the generic response envelope.

delete.description: Demonstrates 204 responses from typed route modules.

post.description: Uploads PNG or JPG image files with validation and metadata

requestBody.description: Multipart form data containing image file (PNG/JPG, max 5MB), optional description and category

200.description: Returns upload confirmation with file metadata and access URL
